tasks.label: Install AWS CLI
tasks.command: set -e; ARCH=$(uname -m); case "$ARCH" in x86_64|amd64) PKG_ARCH=x86_64 ;; aarch64|arm64) PKG_ARCH=aarch64 ;; *) echo Unsupported architecture: $ARCH; exit 1 ;; esac; TMP_DIR=$(mktemp -d); curl -sSL "https://awscli.amazonaws.com/awscli-exe-linux-${PKG_ARCH}.zip" -o "$TMP_DIR/awscliv2.zip"; unzip -q "$TMP_DIR/awscliv2.zip" -d "$TMP_DIR"; sudo "$TMP_DIR/aws/install" --update; rm -rf "$TMP_DIR"; aws --version
